feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business object workflow enhancements
entry.content:
Hi,
I have two business objects, MTRREADDOC (delegated to ZMTRREADOC) and ISUSMORDER (delegated to ZISUSMORDR).

I want access to/values of three things in my ZISUSMORDR methods.

1. In ZMTRREADOC Object method, Zmethod, I have an exporting parameter. Need this value imported (if that is the correct word) in ZISUSMORDR object method Zmethod2.

2. Key field of ZMTRREADOC in ZISUSMORDR in Zmethod2 or in the container.

3. One of the attributes of  ZMTRREADOC in ZISUSMORDR method Zmethod2 or in the container

Based on these values I get from  ZMTRREADOC, I have to assign the values of attributes of ZISUSMORDR. How do I modify these business objects methods/attributes/container to achieve that?

 

Thanks a lot for the help! Would be much appreciated.

 @Sandra_Rossi   @manfred_reinart @raymond_giuseppi  ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Printout from IW38/IW3D is square box with X inside
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone may help me please. Our user can print fine in IW32 but whenever she tries to print in IW3D or IW38, the printout comes out as boxes with X inside. When I try to print at my end in IW3D or IW38 using the same user ID and Maintenance Orders, it prints correctly. Please help me. Where can I check further? Thank you.

Regards,

LMO

entry.title: Classical reports performance guidelines
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

Can anyone share the performance guidelines for classical reports and stranded example?

entry.title: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about SAP notes, if I generate Cofiles and Data from a request, could I generate a note.sar file to apply in a SAP system?

if so, how can I create a note?

if not, is there some way that create a note to apply in SAP?

entry.title: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to create a new Calculation View with a CDS View named CSTOCKQUANVALCUR, but I cannot create a Virtual Table because I think CSTOCKQUANVALCUR needs parameters.

That's why I looked at the view that is the source of CSTOCKQUANVALCUR and saw that the CDS View named 'PMATSTKQTYVALCU1' has no parameters. Also, when I checked, I saw that I could create a Virtual Table with this CDS View.

After creating the Virtual Table, I selected this CDS View in SQL Console, but I saw that no data came. I selected this View directly in the Source System instead of Virtual Table, but no data came again.

However, when I do Data Preview in ABAP or look at SE11/SE16N, I see data coming.

My question is this: How can I use this CDS View in Calculation View? If there is an authorization problem, how can I pass it?

entry.title: How to execute a native sql query from abap program over a HANA calculation view?
entry.content: How can I execute a select from abap over a hana calculation view? supposing that my calculation view is in the schema "_SYS.BIC" and its name is "test/my_view", so how can I select its data from abap?

entry.title: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv report for CL11(display bom level by level)
entry.content:
To Display Custom Field in BOM transactions CS01, ... - SAP Community

In this article, it mentions the program for CS11 is RCS11001, but actually it's different.  I tried se93 then it shows the module pool name is SAPMC29L. It looks very complicated to update SAPMC29L to display a custom field. 

I appreciate for any input.

entry.title: Service Marketplace is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've recently ran into an issue where my service marketplace is not showing on the sap cockpit trial account anymore. I've been using cockpit for about a year now always renewing the 90day trial but this is the first time I came into the issue. 
I have about 20days left of the trial and it just disappeared yesterday, I haven't changed my roles or anything. 
When I set up this trial account, I set it up for integration suite so I can learn CPI, I had the service market place since then but its just gone now?
I saw some people on the community with this issue and their resolution were role based but I can't figure it out even with adding and removing role collections, etc.

entry.title: Missing Future Price at Group Level in ML
entry.content:
Hey all, 

we are currently inserting future prices via a .csv-file and BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA into the table MBEW. 

That automatically shows in MM03 in the accounting view 01 for the company code. It is mandatory however, that the future price is also shown at group level, but that one is empty. How can I also insert the future price at group level?

Thanks in advance. 🙂 


Kind regards
Kim

entry.title: Event handler erorr
entry.content:
I want to create a report that will print the data of vbak table with the hyperlink on vbeln.

when double click on vbeln it will show new table of vbap for the same value of vbeln and it should be done with docking by splliting the screen in 50% ration once someone double click on vbeln of vbak by showing vbak table on 50% and vbap table on other 50%.

this is the code i have written.

DATA: lt_vbak TYPE TABLE OF vbak.

CLASS lcl_event_receiver DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: on_double_click FOR EVENT double_click OF cl_gui_alv_grid
      IMPORTING e_row e_column.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_event_receiver IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD on_double_click.
    DATA: lv_vbeln   TYPE vbak-vbeln,
          lt_vbap    TYPE TABLE OF vbap,
          lv_row     TYPE i,
          lv_vbeln_c TYPE abap_bool.
*          lo_alv   TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid.

    lv_row = e_row + sy-tabix - 2.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_data> TYPE LINE OF zzz_vbak.
    READ TABLE lt_vbak INDEX lv_row ASSIGNING <fs_data>.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
*    ASSIGN er_data->* TO <fs_data>.
      lv_vbeln = <fs_data>-vbeln.

      SELECT * FROM vbap INTO TABLE lt_vbap WHERE vbeln = lv_vbeln.

        CALL SCREEN 200.
        DATA:lo_alv      TYPE REF TO cl_gui_docking_container,
             go_splitter TYPE REF TO cl_gui_splitter_container.
        CREATE OBJECT lo_alv
          EXPORTING
            parent         = cl_gui_container=>screen0
            ratio          = 90.

         CREATE OBJECT go_splitter
    EXPORTING
      parent            = lo_alv.
     endif.
      ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

DATA: lo_event_receiver TYPE REF TO lcl_event_receiver.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  SELECT * FROM vbak INTO TABLE lt_vbak.

    PERFORM display_alv USING lt_vbak.

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&      Form  display_alv
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM display_alv USING it_data TYPE table.
  DATA: lo_alv_grid TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid,
        lo_events   TYPE REF TO cl_gui_custom_container.

  CREATE OBJECT lo_events
    EXPORTING
      container_name = 'ALV_CONTAINER'.

  CREATE OBJECT lo_alv_grid
    EXPORTING
      i_parent = lo_events.

  SET HANDLER lo_event_receiver->on_double_click FOR lo_alv_grid.

  lo_alv_grid->set_table_for_first_display(
    EXPORTING
      i_structure_name  = 'VBAK'
    CHANGING
      it_outtab         = it_data ).
ENDFORM.

entry.title: How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI asset number? (ABAP)
entry.content:
More specifically...How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI asset number QUICKLY?

If I use ILOA/ITOB tables or V_EQUI view, the select statement takes upwards of two minutes.

Using the front-end (transaction code IE03) it takes less than a second to retrieve the equipment if specify the asset number.

Therefore, how can I retrieve an equipment number linked to an asset using a similar method to the front-end (IE03) to return the value quickly?

entry.title: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?
entry.content:
I have a request from a user to modify the Balance Sheet/Income Statement program, especially the tabs and columns.

Is it possible to modify the program in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition? because as far as I know, this SAP product cannot access SAPGUI? If you can't modify the standard program, what solution can you do?

Thank You.

entry.title: Call transaction FB02 to 3rd screen
entry.content:
I need to make a call transaction in fb02, however on the second screen there are many items and I need to double click on the last one (supplier record):
This number of items may vary, so the number of times I click on the scroll button also 

Does anyone know a way for me to go to the third screen already displaying the supplier item? I tried set parameter but it just skips the first screen and I need to go to the third screen.

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: Unable to maintain entries for custom table in SAP using SM30, after adding a new field to the table
entry.content:
Hello,

There is already a custom table in my development system. And I have add a new field to that table and activated it.
So, I wanted to update already existing entries of this table using SM30. But I am not able to see the new field added on the maintenance screen.


Eg: already have a customtable 'z_xyz' with one field say, 'abc'. values for the field 'abc' is maintained using SM30.
Now, I have added a new field 'def' and activated table in SE11.
Now, I have tried to maintain the table z_xyz using SM30, but not able to see the new field added to the maintenance screen (I could see only the field 'abc' not both 'abc' and 'def')

could anyone help me on this case, so that I can update existing record with the values for the new field created in that table?

entry.title: Check if PDF is interactive
entry.content:
hello. I m uploading PDF file using GUI_UPLOAD. And then converting to xstring using FM SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING. 

I need to check if this PDF is interactive (editable) or not. How can I get this info? 

Looked at class cl_fp_pdf_object. But still cant find any method that returning me such info.. 

tried cl_fp_pdf_object->get_metadata - but it returns empty metadata. 

Maybe exists some FMs that can give info

entry.title: Generation repository objects ADT
entry.content:
I try to generate RAP objects in ABAP Development Tools but I am getting the following error:

"Required administrative field(s) is missing in the reference table generate abap repository objects"

Does anyone has an idea what is missing?

entry.title: Determination of Factory Calendar for Supplier Invoice flexible Workflow Deadline
entry.content:
Hi,

We have implemented BADI - MRM_WF_FACTORY_CALENDAR to determine the factory calendar for Supplier Invoice flexible Workflow Deadline.

But this BADI implementation is not getting called when workflow triggers.

Anyone faced similar issue?  or any alternative solution to this issue.

Thanks,

Tusha

entry.title: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

          I have created one substitution for line-item level with some prerequisites and exit. I have maintained that exit in the substitution form routine pool. I have already defined it as well in the exit titles. But when I am trying to go to the exit routine, it's giving the message that it's not found. Please guide me here.

 

Rgds,

Khadeer Basha

entry.title: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN - CREATED RESERVATION
entry.content:
hello experts! I try to create Order in RFC use bapi BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN. it's successfully created but i have problem in reservation. 
I found a problem in the order details, when I checked Components -> General Data -> Reservation Details there was a difference in MovementType as in the picture below.
Why does this happen?
for movementType that complies with the company's rules in Y19, why in the source stored data table is MvTp 261? what should i do?

note: in it_component when use BAPI, I did not enter the reservation number (RESERV_NO). the system/bapi created it automatically.

The suggestions or answers you gave really helped me. Thanks A lot!
